basic_details.job_title: Andaman & Nicobar Command Group C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for LDC, MTS Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Andaman and Nicobar Command (ANC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Group ‘C’ posts (LDC & MTS)! Published in Employment News on 18 April 2026 at andaman.nicobar.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers 9 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18 to 27 years (LDC) and 18 to 25 years (MTS) age group and possessing a 12th pass (for LDC) / Matriculation (for MTS) qualification can apply offline before 15 May 2026. Find all details about the Andaman & Nicobar Command Recruitment 2026, including eligibility, application process, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Minimum age 18 years Maximum age for LDC 27 years. Maximum age for MTS 25 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST: +5 years; OBC: +3 years; PwBD: UR-10, OBC-13, SC/ST-15 years; Ex-Servicemen: length of service +3 years; Central Govt Servants: up to 40 years (UR)/45 years (SC/ST).

qualification.details: Lower Division Clerk (LDC): 12th class pass from a recognised Board or University and a typing speed of 35 words per minute in English or 30 words per minute in Hindi on computer. Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training) [MTS (O&T)]: Matriculation pass or equivalent from a recognised Board/Institute.

salary_details.pay_scale: LDC: Rs. 19900-63200 (Pay Matrix as per VIIth CPC - Level 2), MTS: Rs.18000-56900 (Pay Matrix as per VIIth CPC - Level 1)
salary_details.details: Lower Division Clerk (LDC): Rs. 19900-63200 (Pay Matrix as per VIIth CPC - Level 2) Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training) [MTS (O&T)]: Rs.18000-56900 (Pay Matrix as per VIIth CPC - Level 1)

selection_process: Screening of Applications Written Examination Skill Test (for LDC only) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Andaman & Nicobar Command Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.andaman.nicobar.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Andaman & Nicobar Command Group 'C' posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Andaman & Nicobar Command Group 'C' posts is 16-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Group 'C' posts in Andaman & Nicobar Command?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies for Group 'C' posts in the Andaman & Nicobar Command. These are distributed between the Lower Division Clerk and Multi-Tasking Staff roles.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the LDC post?
faq.answer: For the Lower Division Clerk (LDC) post, candidates must have passed the 12th class from a recognized Board or University and possess a typing speed of 35 words per minute in English or 30 words per minute in Hindi on a computer.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the MTS post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) post is between 18 to 25 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Andaman & Nicobar Command recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the LDC and MTS posts?
faq.answer: The salary for LDC is Rs. 19900-63200 (Level 2), and for MTS, it is Rs.18000-56900 (Level 1) as per the VIIth Central Pay Commission.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these Group 'C' posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Screening of Applications, Written Examination, Skill Test (for LDC only), Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Andaman & Nicobar Command Group 'C' posts?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are eligible for an age relaxation of +5 years over and above the maximum age limit prescribed for the post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Andaman & Nicobar Command. Links are provided in the Important Links section of this article.
